validation_velocity.validation_model: Landing page + pre-sale + 10 customer interviews + 1 paid cohort test
validation_velocity.binary_pass_signal: At least 5 qualified leads reach checkout or paid deposit intent and at least 2 commit within the test window.
validation_velocity.binary_kill_signal: Paid traffic and outreach fail to produce at least 2 qualified checkout or deposit signals in the test window.
validation_velocity.derivation_basis: Protocol-derived from segment, approval-route complexity, buyer motion, and current validation/citation gaps.
validation_velocity.notes: validation queue severity 4; citation status ready; regulatory route present

demand_pull.derivation_basis: Screenshot-backed review adds visible Luxembourg route-keyword demand, incumbent density, and owned Educateme rankings. WTP and paid metrics remain uncollected. Added latest SEMrush scorecard sync.
demand_pull.notes: Observed in screenshots from db=LU: inll.lu ~26.9K organic traffic, houseoftraining.lu ~7K, prolingua.lu ~213 LU keywords / ~1.8K traffic, and educateme.lu ~417 organic traffic with current rankings on sproochentest, learn luxembourgish online, luxembourgish online course, and sproochentest luxembourg. This is local Luxembourg evidence, even though the visible queries span EN/FR/DE/LB inside the LU database. Latest SEMrush scorecard sync: scope local (fit). Anchor query volume sum 2370, max anchor volume 880, capture count 9. Lane keyword count 14 with 3 P1 terms. Latest SEMrush scorecard sync: scope local (fit). Anchor query volume sum 2370, max anchor volume 880, capture count 9. Lane keyword count 14 with 3 P1 terms. Top follow-up terms: cours de luxembourgeois, inl sproochentest, cours de luxembourgeois en ligne, sproochentest luxembourg, cours luxembourgeois en ligne. Cross-border Luxembourg-intent coverage: 5 matching terms in FR/DE seed pack. Latest SEMrush scorecard sync: scope local (fit). Anchor query volume sum 2370, max anchor volume 880, capture count 9. Lane keyword count 14 with 3 P1 terms. Top follow-up terms: cours de luxembourgeois, inl sproochentest, cours de luxembourgeois en ligne, sproochentest luxembourg, cours luxembourgeois en ligne. Cross-border Luxembourg-intent coverage: 5 matching terms in FR/DE seed pack. Segment-aware operator evidence: 4.9/5, adjusted pull 3.59.

regulatory_context.derivation_basis: Derived from confirmed regulatory requirements, approval entities, and current contradiction/risk density in the evidence-backed card.
regulatory_context.notes: 2 confirmed regulatory requirements in current card; 1 approval or accepted-provider routes already shape delivery claims; 5 high-severity risk flags remain in the current card

semrush_snapshot.serp_feature_notes: Best screenshot evidence comes from LU organic positions, not keyword overview. Route queries dominate the visible market and Educateme already ranks on several of them.
semrush_snapshot.traffic_analytics_notes: In db=LU, the Luxembourgish market reads as at least three local lanes: official route / nationality, community-integration, and adult-education discovery. New local watchlist nodes from the latest screenshot pass: moienasbl.lu, cfih.lu, unipop.lu, infpc.lu, lifelong-learning.lu.

collapsed_scores.confidence_reason: Market evidence scope is local with scope fit fit. 9 anchor captures contribute to this scorecard sync. Primary evidence database: LU. Segment-aware operator weight: 4.9/5.

market_evidence.derivation_basis: Synced from the latest SEMrush-derived product market scorecard, which combines normalized keyword captures, product-market mapping, and scoped local/cross-border/reference evidence rules.

independent_operator_examples.name: ETIC
independent_operator_examples.evidence: Focused Luxembourg Sproochentest prep offer with public paid preparation.

independent_operator_examples.name: Lux'Languages
independent_operator_examples.evidence: Small specialist Luxembourgish prep provider with public paid positioning.

independent_operator_examples.name: LuxLessons
independent_operator_examples.evidence: Niche provider visible in the same route market with online prep messaging.

independent_operator_examples.name: Prolingua
independent_operator_examples.evidence: Broad private school with overlapping nationality and Luxembourgish offers.

pricing_or_offer_proof: Observed public alternatives span free-tier messaging through roughly 745-980 EUR paid offers.
independent_operator_summary.social_funnel_signal: No Facebook-group-led funnel signal is captured yet in the validated evidence set.

segment_weighting.rationale: B2C product. Operator proof relevance: high. Social funnel relevance: high. Confirmed independent operators increase the weight.

independent_operator_summary.takeaway: This is a real fragmented prep market with multiple small paid providers, not just an official route.
independent_operator_summary.why_not_stronger: Operator presence is strong, but product-specific reimbursability and monetization are still separate questions.

market_evidence.next_research_step: map lane keywords into product-level commercial notes
market_evidence.notes: Current SEMrush evidence matches the expected scope for this product (local). Evidence database: LU. Captured 9/3 anchor families with total local query volume 2370 and max anchor volume 880. Lane rollup contains 14 deduplicated keywords, including 3 P1 terms. Current watchlist domains: inll.lu, lifelong-learning.lu, public.lu, prolingua.lu, vdl.lu. Top follow-up keywords: cours de luxembourgeois (P1, vol 720), inl sproochentest (P1, vol 210), cours de luxembourgeois en ligne (P1, vol 140), sproochentest luxembourg (P1, vol 140), cours luxembourgeois en ligne (P1, vol 110). Cross-border Luxembourg-intent layer: 5 relevant keywords; top terms cours de luxembourgeois, inl sproochentest, cours de luxembourgeois en ligne. Operator evidence is weighted for B2C: score 4.9/5 with adjustment 0.34. Next step: map lane keywords into product-level commercial notes.
